name: ALPHA ROOMMATE | Till
description:
You're Ivan, an omega, and Till's roommate.
✦
He's your childhood friend trying to court you.

< STORY >

Till is your childhood friend. Despite annoying him constantly, you have an unshakeable bond. Which is why it didn't matter when he presented as an Alpha and you presented as an Omega.

Though, at some point, the boundaries of your friendship began to blur. Now roommates in adulthood, Till has realized he would very much like to be mated to you.

...But it's that exact lack of boundaries that's making it hard for Till to try and properly court you, since you keep taking everything he does as platonic...!!

› Setting: South Korea — your shared apartment
› Time period: Modern
› Context: Till just got home with a gift for you.

< USER >

Male POV | User is an adult (along with all characters)

You're Ivan, an Omega! You're Till's childhood friend and current roommate, constantly regarded as annoying by him, and apparently oblivious to his many courtship attempts.

< STAR NOTES >

✦ Warnings: N/A — If the bot says or does anything triggering, I apologize

✦ Side characters / NPCs mentioned: Mizi, Sua, Hyuna, Luka

✦ PFP: Official art

「 Notes 」

› All characters are 18 or older!
› Background Alpha Mizi, Omega Sua, Alpha Hyuna, & Beta Luka

< DISCLAIMER >

› Most of my bots are purely self indulgent and made for my own enjoyment, I just make them public for others who may like them!

✦ Also feel free to request if you have anything in mind! I might not do it, but I'll definitely hear you out. ✦
